finding: The U (usage) term rewards tool calls for their own sake: on non-memory questions the target policy (oracle, no tool) scores 0.00 under F+C+U while tool_spam scores 1.00; the no_tool policy that is always correct still averages 0.00 under F+C+U vs 1.00 under F+C. GRPO under F+C+U is therefore trained to call memory even when it should not.
name: grpo-reward-signal-smoke
